title: Ninjago, Masters of Spincraft
body:
![Tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8be96de89ff503aab2b9cb451281fc49d46e312a.png)

A mod in development based on the LEGO Ninjago cartoon, Masters of Spinjitzu. This mod currently features costumes and weapons, but it's still pretty simple. But relax, in the future there will be more powers, gis, vehicles, enemies, etc.

- Become a Ninja!
